title: astragalus devius
intro: Astragalus devius, also known as Chinese milkvetch, is a type of perennial legume native to China and the surrounding regions. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus devius include its ability to enhance immune function, reduce fatigue, and improve cardiovascular health. Astragalus devius is typically prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
